ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or market where the size standard is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size standard was created */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size standard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the size standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., chest, waist, hip, inseam) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measurement (e.g., 78 cm) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "measurement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measurement type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inseam_lengths" (
  "inseam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inseam length entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "length_type" TEXT /* Type of inseam length (e.g., normal length, ankle length) */,
  "length_value" TEXT /* Value of the inseam length (e.g., 76-79 cm) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inseam length was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inseam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inseam_lengths_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_sizes" (
  "region_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the regional size mapping */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or market where the size is used */,
  "local_size" TEXT /* Local size equivalent (if applicable) */,
  "local_size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the local size equivalent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the regional size mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer (e.g., lead designer, assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the designer belongs to (e.g., Women's Wear, Men's Wear) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the designer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the designer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what was changed */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the update has been approved */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_updates_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "sales_data" INTEGER /* Sales data for the size */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend analysis (e.g., increase, decrease, stable) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the analytics data is applicable */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analytics data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the analytics data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size available in inventory */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the inventory data is applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)
